# Security Checklist: Ingest property tax assessment data

**Purpose**: Validate safe ingestion, error isolation, and auditability.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/019-ingest-tax-assessments/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Data Safety

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Validation blocks invalid schemas or missing keys from publication.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Invalid records are quarantined and invalid-rate gating is enforced.
- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Promotion is atomic to avoid partial baseline updates.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Failures report actionable details without exposing sensitive data.
- [x] CHK-SEC-005 Promotion failures leave production baseline intact.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-006 Run identifiers and provenance metadata are recorded for audits.
